positive: A whimsical and elegant design featuring a bouquet of stylized woodland flora (ferns, glowing mushrooms, foxglove) intertwined with delicate abstract celestial elements (crescent moons, star clusters, milky nebula swirls). The style is a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau botanical illustration and modern celestial map etching, rendered with rich jewel tones (deep teal, emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) accented by antique gold leaf detailing. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for a t-shirt print, utilizing thick black outlines and high contrast for clear separation. The elements should appear as negative space cutouts or intricate linear engravings, ensuring clean silhouettes and maximum visual impact on fabric.
negative: ugly, tiling, blurry, noise, amateur, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photo, harsh shadows, gradient fade, messy composition
